name: ficus-lsp
description: Ficus language support (live diagnostics + did-you-mean quickfixes) via the Ficus language server.

ficus.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the ficus-lsp binary. If empty, the extension looks for 'ficus-lsp' in this extension's folder.

ficus.ficusPath.description: Absolute path to the bin/ficus compiler. If empty, the server looks for bin/ficus under the workspace root, then on PATH.
